title: SequenceFile Entry Management
description: The 'lib/output/committer' directory in Hadoop MapReduce manages SequenceFile entries. It contains 'manifest/impl' handling 'FileEntry' objects. 'EntryFileIO.java' implements Producer pattern, using a thread for writing, interfacing with Hadoop's SequenceFile class. This component offers methods for creating writers and readers, managing a writer thread for queuing and processing entries. It ensures efficient I.O through multi-threading, optimizing the output commit process in MapReduce jobs.
